response:
**Steam ban status (GetPlayerBans)**

> **Limitation:** This reflects **these Steam accounts only**. bonsAI does **not** prove someone was **your opponent** unless you copied their **verified** 64-bit SteamID (or trusted profile URL) yourself.

**Skipped inputs**
- `https://steamcommunity.com/id/gabelogannewell` — Vanity URLs (/id/…) need ResolveVanityURL; paste the numeric /profiles/765… URL or 64-bit SteamID instead.

No valid SteamIDs to query from those tokens. Usage: `bonsai:vac-check 7656119…` (comma- or space-separated), or **steamcommunity.com/profiles/765…** URLs. Vanity `/id/…` links are not supported in this build.
